simple_types.name: Object_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Object_Kind is (Rectangle_Obj, Point_Obj,
  Ellipse_Obj, Polygon_Obj, Tile_Obj, Text_Obj);

array_types.name: Object_Array
array_types.code:
type Object_Array is array (Natural range <>)
   of Object;

record_types.name: Object

access_types.name: String_Access
access_types.code: type String_Access is access all String;
